name: kannaka-kax
description: Agent-Kax — the Kannaka Artifact Exchange. A REST API that harvests agent-generated artifacts from connectors (civitai, huggingface, OpenBotCity, the constellation NATS bus), scores/narrates them with Kannaka as taste-maker, and curates them into scarcity-backed drops + a storefront/marketplace. Skill teaches Claude how to run the api-server and drive the artifact → score → drop → publish workflow over /api.
